properties.mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom,      rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px,      rgba(0, 0, 0, 1) 50px,      rgba(0, 0, 0, 1) calc(100% - 50px),      rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 100%)
linear-gradient(to right,                  rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px,                  rgba(0, 0, 0, 1) 50px,                  rgba(0, 0, 0, 1) calc(100% - 50px),                  rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 100%)
linear-gradient(to top, transparent 0%, black 10%, black 90%, transparent 100%)
linear-gradient(to right, transparent 0%, black 10%, black 90%, transparent 100%)
